summary: Iteration 7 (ZYNEX design-alignment pass) — regression + new visual elements verified. Backend: 5/5 dropi + 12/12 launch_round tests green. Frontend: marquee ticker, hero wireframe SVG, gradient headline, 7 connector pills, gradient CTA class, VIP form submission, day/night theme (night bg=rgb(22,24,28) NOT pure black), Copilot mascot + 4 quick cards + gradient send/new-thread buttons, constellation canvas present on Funnel/Copilot/Login, operator gate, all 3 back-compat redirects, sidebar navs, and Products page loads with 2 cards. 100% pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Funnel.jsx still contains legacy hardcoded 'text-white' / 'text-zinc-*' colors in several sections (problem-agitate block line 365-378, bonus/scarcity/vip-form). These do not flip with day/night theme — day mode still shows dark-mode-specific text. Consider mapping to var(--text-primary/secondary/muted) for full theme coverage.

Constellation canvas is fixed-position and re-mounts on route change; on Copilot page a single canvas is present (per requirement), but the component's inner N cap (density=90 vs Funnel's density=110) hard-caps points based on viewport — acceptable but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_UI Iter7 VIP lead created via VIP form submission during Playwright run; safe to purge from /app/vip-leads if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme is stored under localStorage key 'litper-theme' (values 'day'/'night'); documentElement gets class 'matrix-day' or 'matrix-night'. Night body bg = rgb(22,24,28); Day body bg ~ rgba(233,234,236,0.96). Backend pytest requires PYTHONPATH=/app/backend for test_dropi_import.py to import the dropi_import module — the other test files use requests to hit the live API and work without PYTHONPATH. Constellation canvas count on funnel & copilot each = 1 (they don't stack).
